description.p: Whisp is a beautifully simple, gesture-driven note-taking application designed for GNOME.

ul.li: Live Markdown formatting (bold, italics, headers, code, lists)
Searchable note list directly from the header
Instant saving and Native UI styling

description.p: Added a new Interactive Welcome Note for first-time onboarding to help new users discover powerful shortcuts and features!
Added a new visual Appearance selector and new Paper Themes:

ul.li: Replaced the basic dropdown menu with a visual Grid selector for Paper Themes, showing live miniature snippets of how your notes will look.
Added a new 'Large Grid' paper background option.
Added a visual Theme Switcher in the main menu to easily toggle between System, Light, and Dark modes.
Added a Startup Behavior preference to choose whether the app restores your last active note or starts with a fresh empty draft.
Added an interactive 'Undo' button directly to the note deletion popup toast for immediate and reliable recovery.
Fixed a race condition where quickly deleting a note using a keyboard shortcut would occasionally cause the note to save itself in the background as a "ghost note".

description.p: Added new Quality of Life features and fixed critical bugs:

ul.li: Added a visual Theme Switcher in the main menu to easily toggle between System, Light, and Dark modes.
Added a Startup Behavior preference to choose whether the app restores your last active note or starts with a fresh empty draft.
Fixed a race condition where quickly deleting a note using a keyboard shortcut would occasionally cause the note to save itself in the background as a "ghost note".

description.p: Fixed a severe Flatpak Document Portal permission error that caused permanent deletion when using custom Note directories.
Added delete confirmation dialog. Fixed a bug where deleting empty notes could lock the UI. Restored deleted notes to their original position.
Added a native GNOME About dialog with credits and license details. Restored original icon size based on user feedback.
Metadata updates to satisfy Flathub quality guidelines and roadmap additions.
Initial release of Whisp. A minimalist, gesture-driven scratchpad for GNOME.
